cases.prompt: 이 노트에 위키링크 추가하고 콜아웃 만들어줘.

assertions.text: The skill adds an Obsidian wikilink to the note.
The skill creates an Obsidian callout in the note.
The edits use Obsidian Flavored Markdown syntax.

cases.prompt: Create a callout and embed a note in this Obsidian markdown file.

assertions.text: The skill creates a callout in the markdown file.
The skill embeds the referenced note using Obsidian embed syntax.

cases.prompt: Write an Obsidian note with properties and a wikilink to another page.

assertions.text: The skill writes a new Obsidian markdown note.
The note contains a wikilink to the referenced page.
